creator: rwestlun@gmail.com
text:
https://www.freebsd.org/doc/handbook/desktop-browsers.html

Handbook section 6.2 Browsers contains a few sections about how to setup Java and other plugins in various browsers.

Firefox and Chromium (among others) no longer support NPAPI plugins like Java, so these instructions are no longer valid.

I think you can still use the icedtea-web package to run downloaded Java Web Start applications manually, which should be explained in this section.
